inline_comments.message:
I am not sure the copyright and the All rights reserved mentions are needed here...
the contributions are under LF CLA (for the license) on one hand and contributors are already identified with the git history

We have been following this practice in policy, it was written somewhere more clearly in ONAP but seems to have disappeared. Keeping the license up-to-date and noting which company made the changes. If you don't enforce it in your repos, I can remove it.
